seoTitle: Martinsville vs Marulan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Martinsville and Marulan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Martinsville and Marulan.
heading: Martinsville vs Marulan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Martinsville, New South Wales and Marulan, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Marulan has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Martinsville (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Martinsville or Marulan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Martinsville has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Marulan scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Martinsville scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Marulan scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Martinsville or Marulan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Marulan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
